_comment: HARE Trail skill trigger phrases (English baseline, versioned). These are short words/phrases a user might say to invoke each skill; the host agent matches the user's request against them. English is ALWAYS merged in as a fallback regardless of the configured HARETRAIL_UI_LANG, so these phrases keep working in any setup. To add or refine phrases for another language, run: install-connectors.sh --gen-triggers <code>  (writes ~/.haretrail/triggers/<code>.json), then edit that file by hand. Keys must match the skill folder names under skills/.
daily: what did I do this week
